title: OSS Manifest (CDN-loaded + vendored open-source dependencies)
description: Hand-maintained inventory of open-source code shipped with the build that is NOT covered by package-lock.json. Read by scripts/oss-generate.mjs alongside package-lock.json to produce sbom.json and attributions.json.

version.description: Exact upstream version of the snapshot (CDN release version, vendored upstream version).

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. 'MIT') or SPDX expression (e.g. 'MIT OR Apache-2.0'). Use 'UNKNOWN' only as a last resort — the allowlist gate WILL fail unless exempted.

copyright.description: Upstream-published copyright line, verbatim. null if upstream does not publish one.

homepageUrl.description: Upstream project homepage or canonical repository URL. Used as the outbound link on the attributions page.

supplier.description: How the code arrives in the build. CDN entries are loaded via <script src=...> from index.html; vendored entries are checked into the repo.

scope.description: Manifest entries are always runtime by construction (we only manifest what ships to users).

cdnUrl.description: Exact CDN URL from index.html. REQUIRED when supplier === 'cdn'.

vendoredPath.description: Repo-relative path to the vendored source tree (e.g. '.specify/'). REQUIRED when supplier === 'vendored'. Generator fails if the path does not exist.
